notes: Chemosensory receptor A (Apgr.A subfamily). MUST NOT be marked as non-chemoreceptor by the classifier — this is the canonical chemoreceptor truth set.
Chemosensory receptor B (Apgr.B). Rhinophore + oral-tentacle expression.
5-hydroxytryptamine receptor 1 (5-HTB1). Cloned + functionally characterized; Aplysia serotonin signaling literature (Barbas et al. 2003).
5-hydroxytryptamine receptor 2 (5-HTB2). Distinct from 5-HTB1; both are well-characterized aminergic receptors.
5-HT4 receptor. RefSeq curated entry for Aplysia 5-HT4.

Buccalin/allatostatin-A receptor. Neuropeptide receptor — invertebrate-specific (allatostatin signaling). MUST be marked as non-chemoreceptor; if missed, classifier has a false-negative on a clear non-chemo case.
